title: Emojiless
description: A dead simple emoji mod using Inline
body:
## What?
A dead simple mod for emojis in text, making use of [Inline](https://modrinth.com/mod/inline).
## Why?
Because emojiful is incompatible with inline and other text rendering mods, and there's no good alternatives for custom emojis
## How?
just dump png/gif files in `assets/<namespace>/emojis/` in a resource pack. the filename becomes the shortcode, so `assets/myemojipack/emojis/mycoolemoji.png` becomes `:mycoolemoji:`.
## Are there built in emojis?
not yet
